--- ### ALL PAGES ### layout: themes/classy/admin/core/minimal-viewport-locked ### THEME CONFIG ### theme: header: title: content: "Calendar" icon: "calendar-days" breadcrumbs: items: - label: "Admin" href: "/admin" - label: "Marketing" - label: "Calendar" ### REGULAR PAGES ### meta: title: "Calendar - Admin" description: "Marketing calendar for scheduling newsletters and notifications" breadcrumb: "Calendar" ### ICON PRE-RENDERING ### prerender_icons: - name: "chevron-left" - name: "chevron-right" - name: "plus" - name: "pen" - name: "trash" - name: "grip-dots-vertical" - name: "clock" - name: "envelope" - name: "bell" - name: "paper-plane" - name: "calendar-day" - name: "calendar-week" - name: "calendar" - name: "grid-2" - name: "mobile" - name: "comment-sms" - name: "circle" ---
{% uj_icon "plus", "fa-md me-2" %} Create Event
{% uj_icon "paper-plane", "fa-sm me-2 text-info" %} Event Type
Content
Title is required (3-100 characters)
{% uj_icon "clock", "fa-sm me-2 text-info" %} Schedule
Date is required
Time is required
{% uj_icon "users", "fa-sm me-2 text-success" %} Target Audience
Delivery Channels
Settings
